lore.english:
An Onmyoji dispatched to Gosha. A teacher at Gokou Academy, an institution in Rokuhara, Kyoto, responsible for training Onmyoji. She is also the captain of Kyoto's elite Onmyoji unit, the "Kujishu". Though born blind, she gained the ability to see like an ordinary person through the use of Mind's Eye, a technique taught to her by the Shinganji clan. A master swordsman, proficient in the anti-demon swordsmanship known as "Onmyo Nenryu" which is passed down among Onmyoji. She has a long-standing rivalry with Akiyama Rinko, a master of the Ittoryu swordsmanship, who respects and calls her "Azu".
 
As a master swordsman, she uses Mind's Eye to observe her surroundings with precision, excels at misleading her opponents with swift movements to create openings to strike with her sword. Additionally, she employs Onmyo-art techniques such as using shikigami to defend against attacks or form special seals to summon clones, blending swordsmanship and magical tactics in combat.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&CRI_DMG] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase CRIT DMG of Power allies by 17.5% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase CRIT DMG of Power allies by 17.5% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Onmyo Nenryu: Tornado Strike[-]
skills.description:
Approaches the enemy while spinning and swings the sword elegantly.
When attacking an enemy while [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_1402] is on [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime], [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:140102]%)[-].
skills.description_readable:
Approaches the enemy while spinning and swings the sword elegantly.
When attacking an enemy while Shikigami: Bodyguard is on Cooldown, CRIT Rate increases by (7.5%).

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Shikigami: Bodyguard[-]
skills.description:
Brings the hand to the mouth and recites a spell. 
Gains  [&Color_Cyan]([V3:140201]%)[-] [&SpdUp] and [&Color_Cyan]([V3:140202]%)[-] [&AtkUp].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:140201] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Brings the hand to the mouth and recites a spell. 
Gains  (19.5%) SPD UP and (40%) ATK UP.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Onmyo Nenryu: Gale Charge[-]
skills.description:
Azusa pierces the enemy with a powerful stab attack.
When attacking, [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] increases by [&Color_Cyan][V3:140302]%[-] of the character's SPD.
When attacking a target with [&HP] less than [&Color_Cyan]50%[-], [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] additionally increases equal to [&Color_Cyan][V3:140302]%[-] of SPD.
When killing a target with this skill, the character gains an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddTurn].
skills.description_readable:
Azusa pierces the enemy with a powerful stab attack.
When attacking, CRIT Rate increases by 22.5% of the character's SPD.
When attacking a target with HP less than 50%, CRIT Rate additionally increases equal to 22.5% of SPD.
When killing a target with this skill, the character gains an Extra Turn.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Onmyo Nenryu Swordswoman[-]
skills.description: If the character's [&HP] is [&Color_Cyan]80%[-] or more, performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:140401]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.
skills.description_readable: If the character's HP is 80% or more, performs a (15%) DEF Penetrate attack.

Brings the hand to the mouth and recites a spell, gains [&Color_Cyan]([V3:141201]%)[-] [&HealTurn] and [&Color_Cyan]([V3:141202]%)[-] [&Strengthen].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:141202] turn(s)
skill_data.description_readable:
Brings the hand to the mouth and recites a spell, gains (5%) Healing Over Time and (19.5%) Power-up.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
